title: Service and repair post hole digging systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service and repair post hole digging systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to service and repair post hole digging system

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace service and repair procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace service and repair procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace service and repair procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to service and repair post hole digging system

elements.title: Determine service and repair requirements of post hole digging system

pcs.text: Inspect and test system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Identify faults and determine causes of faults2.3 Report inspection findings and test results according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for necessary service, repair or adjustment2.4 Obtain authorisation to proceed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect and test system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Identify faults and determine causes of faults2.3 Report inspection findings and test results according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for necessary service, repair or adjustment2.4 Obtain authorisation to proceed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and test system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Identify faults and determine causes of faults2.3 Report inspection findings and test results according to workplace procedures, and include recommendations for necessary service, repair or adjustment2.4 Obtain authorisation to proceed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine service and repair requirements of post hole digging system

elements.title: Carry out service and repair activities

pcs.text: Analyse service and repair options and select those most appropriate to the circumstances3.2 Select and check tools, equipment and materials3.3 Remove components and inspect for serviceability according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements3.4 Fit and adjust reusable, repaired and replacement components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse service and repair options and select those most appropriate to the circumstances3.2 Select and check tools, equipment and materials3.3 Remove components and inspect for serviceability according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements3.4 Fit and adjust reusable, repaired and replacement components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse service and repair options and select those most appropriate to the circumstances3.2 Select and check tools, equipment and materials3.3 Remove components and inspect for serviceability according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements3.4 Fit and adjust reusable, repaired and replacement components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out service and repair activities

elements.title: Check post hole digging system for normal operation

pcs.text: Operate and compare system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Make adjustments as required and re-test post hole digging system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate and compare system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Make adjustments as required and re-test post hole digging system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate and compare system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Make adjustments as required and re-test post hole digging system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Check post hole digging system for normal operation

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
